pet.name: BC
pet.special_needs:
Large senior dog with weight management needs, slower walks, joint
  support, and consistent hydration monitoring.
pet.characteristics: Chihuahuas are small, energetic dogs requiring regular but gentle exercise, consistent socialization, and protection from temperature extremes and physical trauma. They benefit from frequent small meals to maintain stable blood sugar, dental care to prevent tooth decay common in the breed, and mental enrichment through play and training. Monitoring includes regular veterinary checkups, weight management, and attention to patellar luxation and heart conditions typical of the breed. They thrive with routine, clear boundaries, and close human companionship, and do well in apartment settings with access to safe outdoor time.
pet.species_profile_summary: Chihuahuas typically live 12-18 years in captive care; breed-standard care emphasizes small-portion nutrition, dental health, temperature control, and early detection of genetic predispositions.

age_context.summary: Chihuahuas typically live 12-18 years in captive care; breed-standard care emphasizes small-portion nutrition, dental health, temperature control, and early detection of genetic predispositions.

extra_context:
Owner wants a low-impact weekly routine with indoor enrichment

retrieved_passages.title: Enrichment and Daily Monitoring
retrieved_passages.content: Daily care plans are stronger when they combine essential care with realistic enrichment and observation. Short play, sniff walks, brushing, or calm interaction can improve quality of life without requiring large blocks of time.

retrieved_passages.title: Senior Pet Support
retrieved_passages.content: Senior pets often need lower-impact exercise, more frequent comfort checks, and closer observation of appetite, hydration, and mobility. Shorter walks, joint-friendly movement, and calm enrichment are often easier to tolerate than intense activity.

retrieved_passages.title: Puppy and Kitten Routine Basics
retrieved_passages.content: Exercise and enrichment for very young pets should stay short and positive. Puppies often do better with several brief walks or training moments instead of one long outing, and kittens benefit from short interactive play sessions that stop before exhaustion.

retrieved_passages.title: Puppy and Kitten Routine Basics
retrieved_passages.content: Young pets benefit from short, predictable care blocks spread throughout the day. Frequent feeding, hydration checks, short play sessions, and bathroom or litter monitoring help establish routine without overwhelming the pet.

retrieved_passages.title: Kidney Diet and Hydration Support
retrieved_passages.content: Owners should follow the veterinary feeding plan already prescribed and avoid changing food or supplement amounts without veterinary guidance. If a pet refuses multiple meals or shows sudden decline, the safe action is to contact a veterinarian.

raw_recommendations.name: Morning hydration check and fresh water
raw_recommendations.notes: Ensure fresh water available; monitor intake for senior with weight management needs.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior pets require closer observation of hydration and appetite per senior pet support guidelines.

raw_recommendations.name: Low-impact walk or sniff session
raw_recommendations.notes: Gentle pace, shorter duration suitable for senior joints; sniff walks provide enrichment without strain.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior pets benefit from shorter walks and joint-friendly movement; sniff walks combine exercise with mental enrichment.

raw_recommendations.name: Feeding with portion monitoring
raw_recommendations.notes: Follow veterinary feeding plan; monitor appetite and portion size for weight management.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Weight management and consistent feeding routine support senior health; follow prescribed veterinary plan without changes.

raw_recommendations.name: Afternoon enrichment and calm interaction
raw_recommendations.notes: Indoor play, gentle training, or brushing; low-impact options ideal for rainy days.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Short play and calm interaction improve quality of life without requiring large time blocks; indoor enrichment supports routine during weather constraints.

raw_recommendations.name: Evening comfort check and mobility observation
raw_recommendations.notes: Observe gait, comfort level, and any signs of joint stiffness or mobility changes.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior pets need frequent comfort checks and closer observation of mobility to detect early changes.

raw_recommendations.name: Weekly gentle brushing and coat check
raw_recommendations.notes: Brush gently; check skin and coat condition; supports bonding and early detection of issues.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Brushing provides enrichment, bonding, and allows monitoring of skin and coat health typical for breed care.

raw_recommendations.name: Monthly veterinary check-in reminder
raw_recommendations.notes: Schedule or confirm regular vet visits; discuss weight, joints, hydration, and any behavioral changes.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Senior Chihuahuas benefit from regular veterinary checkups for early detection of breed-typical conditions and weight management oversight.

blocked_recommendations.name: Feeding with portion monitoring
reasons: Recommendation contains unsafe or unsupported medical advice.
